title: Pad Thai
description: A lightweight Garden of Glass modpack focusing on Botania and Create :)
body:
A lightweight Garden of Glass modpack focused on Botania and Create!

We have:

- Botania
- Create
- Create Crafts & Additions
- Farmer's Delight
- Quark (including Variant Selector!)

and more!

Please report issues and suggestions to the Discord :)
